description:
OL 316 (REV. 2/2017)  WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle was parked with hazard lights blinking while in manual mode on Green St. facing east towards Varennes St. A car reversed 
from a horizontal parking spot of the oncoming lane and made contact with the rear left corner of the Zoox Vehicle, damaging the sensors. 
Police were not called. 
 
Go to Page 3
